spec.name: The Half-Wet Drain
spec.description: You are in a sewer drain where the floor is covered with water. To the north it looks more dry, south however the drain runs down into some water.

north.description: To the north lies a dry four-way junction.

south.description: To the south you see a sewer drain filled with water.

extra_descs.description: The water is dirty but it looks like you would be able to swim in it.
